trajectory.model_output:
<python_code>
import numpy as np
from scipy.spatial.transform import Rotation as R

# Open the gripper before grasping
open_gripper()

# Get the grasp pose for the extruded handle of the brown square nut
handle_position, handle_quaternion_wxyz = sample_grasp_pose('extruded handle of the brown square nut')

# Approach and grasp the handle with a z_approach to ensure safe motion
goto_pose(handle_position, handle_quaternion_wxyz, z_approach=0.1)
goto_pose(handle_position, handle_quaternion_wxyz)  # Final grasp without approach offset

# Close the gripper to grasp the nut
close_gripper()

# Get the object center pose of the brown square nut to determine its orientation
center_position, center_quaternion_wxyz = get_object_pose('white hollow center of the brown square nut')

# Compute the fixed transform from the center to the handle (this defines how the nut is oriented when inserted)
# This transform will be applied later to align the nut during insertion
delta_rot = R.from_quat(handle_quaternion_wxyz).inv() * R.from_quat(center_quaternion_wxyz)
delta_pos = np.array(center_position) - np.array(handle_position)

# Get the pose of the peg on the brown square block where the nut should be inserted
peg_position, peg_quaternion_wxyz = get_object_pose('peg of the brown square block')

# Compute desired final center position and orientation of the nut when inserted
final_center_position = np.array(peg_position)
final_center_quaternion_wxyz = peg_quaternion_wxyz

# Now compute the corresponding handle pose that would place the nut's center at the peg
# Apply inverse of the delta transform to get where the handle should be
final_handle_position = final_center_position - delta_rot.apply(delta_pos)
final_handle_rotation = (R.from_quat(final_center_quaternion_wxyz) * delta_rot.inv()).as_quat()

# Insert the nut by moving the handle to this computed pose using z_approach for precision
goto_pose(final_handle_position, final_handle_rotation, z_approach=0.1)
goto_pose(final_handle_position, final_handle_rotation)

# Optionally open gripper to release
open_gripper()

# Return to home joint position
goto_home_joint_position()
</python_code>

import numpy as np
from scipy.spatial.transform import Rotation as R

# Open the gripper before grasping
open_gripper()

# Get the grasp pose for the extruded handle of the brown square nut
handle_position, handle_quaternion_wxyz = sample_grasp_pose('extruded handle of the brown square nut')

# Approach and grasp the handle with a z_approach to ensure safe motion
goto_pose(handle_position, handle_quaternion_wxyz, z_approach=0.1)
goto_pose(handle_position, handle_quaternion_wxyz)  # Final grasp without approach offset

# Close the gripper to grasp the nut
close_gripper()

# Get the object center pose of the brown square nut to determine its orientation
center_position, center_quaternion_wxyz = get_object_pose('white hollow center of the brown square nut')

# Compute the fixed transform from the center to the handle (this defines how the nut is oriented when inserted)
# This transform will be applied later to align the nut during insertion
delta_rot = R.from_quat(handle_quaternion_wxyz).inv() * R.from_quat(center_quaternion_wxyz)
delta_pos = np.array(center_position) - np.array(handle_position)

# Get the pose of the peg on the brown square block where the nut should be inserted
peg_position, peg_quaternion_wxyz = get_object_pose('peg of the brown square block')

# Compute desired final center position and orientation of the nut when inserted
final_center_position = np.array(peg_position)
final_center_quaternion_wxyz = peg_quaternion_wxyz

# Now compute the corresponding handle pose that would place the nut's center at the peg
# Apply inverse of the delta transform to get where the handle should be
final_handle_position = final_center_position - delta_rot.apply(delta_pos)
final_handle_rotation = (R.from_quat(final_center_quaternion_wxyz) * delta_rot.inv()).as_quat()

# Insert the nut by moving the handle to this computed pose using z_approach for precision
goto_pose(final_handle_position, final_handle_rotation, z_approach=0.1)
goto_pose(final_handle_position, final_handle_rotation)

# Optionally open gripper to release
open_gripper()

# Return to home joint position
goto_home_joint_position()
